Defendants Buchalter, Robert Zadek, Denise Field Petition For Arbitration (For Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Off Calendar

Defendants Buchalter, Robert Zadek, Denise Field Petition For Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, James A. Quadra of the law offices of Quadra & Coll LLP (415-426-3502) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, James A. Murphy of the law offices of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (213-327-3500) appears as counsel for plaintiff/defendant/moving/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendants Buchalter, A Professional Corporation, Robert Zadek and Denise Field's petition for order compelling arbitration and staying action pending arbitration is denied. For details, please see the written order filed, the transcript of this date's proceedings or the clerk's full minutes in Word (.doc) format. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)
